item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.82,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第一轮下调低库存权重，点击满意度从61%到66%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第二轮提升新品权重，满意度到69%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第三轮压低噪声标签，满意度到72%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天想调整价格权重，目标75%，请给步骤"}],"abstain_reason":"legal convergence exclusion: the ranking/weight object is being directly iterated, each prior step reports measurable click-satisfaction improvement, and the prompt does not show same-class symptom recurrence after failed patches"}
